option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value:
#!/bin/bash # Build Docker images directly into Minikube's Docker daemon. # Prereq: minikube running + all services packaged. set -e eval $(minikube docker-env)
echo "=== Building dalogin ===" docker build -t dalogin-quarkus:local ./dalogin-quarkus
echo "=== Building mbook ===" docker build -t mbook-quarkus:local ./mbook-quarkus
echo "=== Building mbooks ===" docker build -t mbooks-quarkus:local ./mbooks-quarkus
echo "=== Building simple-service-webapp ===" docker build -t simple-service-webapp-quarkus:local ./simple-service-webapp-quarkus
eval $(minikube docker-env --unset) echo "=== All images built in Minikube ==="
